mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate reduce corporate financing costs and lower equity discount rates, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 24-month rolling window, or forward returns are negative in >55% of rate-cut months.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate crosses above 6.0 percent, labor market slack suppresses wage growth and signals economic deceleration, triggering negative equity returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Forward returns exceed +1.5 percent in 70 percent of triggered months, or Rank IC drops below 0.01 over a 3-year window.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous month-over-month declines in retail sales and housing starts indicate synchronized consumer and housing demand contraction, forcing earnings downgrades and negative equity returns.
failure_condition: Joint decline periods show positive forward returns in >55 percent of cases, or interaction term coefficient is statistically insignificant (p > 0.10).

mechanism_narrative: Sharp month-over-month drops in industrial production signal immediate supply chain bottlenecks and inventory drawdowns, triggering short-term risk-off positioning and negative returns.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are positive in >60 percent of industrial production decline months during recovery phases.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained consumer price index growth crossing above 4.0 percent forces central bank tightening expectations, compressing equity multiples and generating negative forward returns.
failure_condition: Forward returns are positive in >65 percent of triggered periods, or Rank IC falls below 0.03 over any 36-month rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Month-over-month increases in total nonfarm payrolls reflect expanding economic activity and corporate revenue growth, driving positive equity returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Rank IC falls below 0.01 over any 24-month rolling window, or forward returns are negative in >50 percent of payroll growth months.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence between quarterly GDP growth and monthly retail sales indicates weakening consumer momentum relative to aggregate output, prompting near-term equity sell-offs.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns exceed +0.5 percent in >60 percent of divergence episodes, or interaction coefficient is insignificant.

mechanism_narrative: When industrial production crosses below its 12-month moving average, manufacturing contraction signals impending recessionary pressures, leading to negative forward returns.
failure_condition: Forward returns are positive in >58 percent of triggered months, or predictive accuracy drops below 52 percent in out-of-sample testing.
